title: The Sine-Gordon Wobble
abstract: Nonperturbative, oscillatory, winding number one solutions of the Sine-Gordon equation are presented and studied numerically. We call these nonperturbative shape modes {\sl wobble} solitons. Perturbed Sine-Gordon kinks are found to decay to {\sl wobble} solitons.
comment: Revised version, journal reference: Journal of physics A 37, 11603 (2004)
